text:
おかえり！
ウワサ通り、すごいところね。

切り立った崖から
落ちたりしないか
冷や冷やしたわよ……

とりあえず
無事帰ってきてよかったわ。
この調子で頑

You're back! The rumors were right--that place
is something else.

I was on tenterhooks wondering if you were
gonna take a tumble off that cliff.

Anyways, you got back safe and sound and
that's all that matters. Keep up the pace!
